sd.prompt: (masterpiece:1.3), (best quality:1.2), 2D pixel art tileset, top-down RPG tile, forest dirt path, enchanted woods, soft brown earth with root traces (#6B4423), small pebbles, leaf litter, deep forest green (#1B4332) grass edges, magical forest atmosphere, seamless, (2px black outline:1.3), (clean pixel edges:1.4), 32x32, 3-step shading, {piece_description}, <lora:pixel-art-style-v2:0.7>, <lora:custom-aeterna-v1:0.8>
sd.negative: 3D render, realistic, blurry, watermark, text, low quality, noisy, perspective, character, urban

dalle.prompt: Top-down 2D pixel art RPG tile, 32x32 pixels, forest dirt path for enchanted magical woods. Soft brown (#6B4423) earth with root traces, pebbles, leaf litter. Deep green (#1B4332) grass at edges. {piece_description}. Clean pixel edges, black outline, seamless. Fantasy forest style.

midjourney.prompt: top-down 2D pixel art RPG tile, forest dirt path, enchanted woods, brown earth root traces, green grass edges, {piece_description}, 32x32, clean edges, black outline, seamless, fantasy forest --ar 1:1 --s 250 --niji 6

generation_notes.autotile_workflow: Generate center tile first → derive edges/corners via inpainting
generation_notes.bioluminescence: Night variants: all (#7DF9FF) elements glow at 100% intensity; Day variants: glow at 20%
generation_notes.post_process: remove_bg → color_correct to palette → qa_runner tile-seamless check
